title: centaurea cineraria subsp. umbrosa
intro: Centaurea cineraria subsp. umbrosa, also known as Silver Dust, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small, white or pink flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Centaurea cineraria subsp. umbrosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers and then infusing them in hot water or oil.
